question_template: The observer previously saw object '{object_id}'. Which first action should it take to return toward it?
answer_rule: Plan path from current pose to object's last known pose; choose first discrete action.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Requires multi-frame or episode-level metadata, not a single image only.
